problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Microbiome. Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
